comments.comment:

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: in prior years the emission factor from the engines manufacturer was used to calculate the emissions. For 2023 the emission rate from the stack testing was used to calculate the NOx emissions resulting in an increase.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: in prior year the engines manufacturers emission rate for CO was used to calculate total CO.  for 2023 the stack testing emission rate was used to calculate the CO emissions which resulted in lower CO emissions

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
in prior year the engines manufacturers emission rate for VOC was used to calculate total VOC.  for 2023 the stack testing emission rate was used to calculate the VOC emissions which resulted in a larger VOC emission per hour of run time.

In addition the engines were run less in 2023 then previous years which resulted in an overall lower VOC emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
More landfill gas was collected and destroyed in 2024 compared to 2023. new stack testing was performed on the generators and flares. the emission rates changed as follows: 
Generator #1 15.1 kg/hr in 2023 to 1.99 kg/hr in 2024, 
Generator #2 14.6 kg/hr in 2023 to 3.19 kg/hr in 2024. 
Flare #1 0.473 kg/hr in 2023 to 1.71 kg/hr in 2024
New Flare #2  0.93 kg/hr

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
More landfill gas was collected and destroyed in 2024 compared to 2023. new stack testing was performed on the generators and flares. the site specific emission rates changed as follows: 
GEnerator #1 1.57 kg/hr in 2023 to 2.91 kg/hr in 2024, 
Generator #2 1.33 kg/hr in 2023 to 2.51 kg/hr in 2024. 
Flare #1 0.29 kg/hr in 2023 to 0.36 kg/hr in 2024
New Flare #2  0.12 kg/hr

comments.comment:

reasonsForNoActivities.en: Activities were implemented in a previous year; additional activities are either unnecessary or unfeasible at this time
